tasks.label: verify-recovery
args: javac -d out (Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.java src/main/java | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }); if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; java -cp out ca.concordia.soen342.poc.CsvImportExportDemo; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; java -cp out ca.concordia.soen342.poc.CsvImportExportSelfTest
